title: ET Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)

jsonLd.title: ET Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money:
ET Money is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money!
